description: POLL @ 2026-04-28T23:09:46Z (~11.54h after prior 11:37Z poll, at-cadence). NET QUIET — all 7 dome page hashes byte-identical to last poll baseline; 9 commits since last poll all auto-only (5x Auto-update ECM status, 2x ECM data pull, 0x daily AI review — 8th regen still pending ~07:41Z 2026-04-29); 0 source-file touches; 0 manual commits; all parameters clean (disc_radius=20015, firmament_height=8537, decay=8619, sun_alt=5733, moon_alt=2534, n(r)=0.20, accuracy=94.5%, WIN count=69, V51.1 verbatim title); api/index.json byte-stable (last_updated=2026-04-17); daily_review.json byte-stable (last_updated=2026-04-28T07:41:14Z, registry 69/4/10). Manual-commit drought now 11.46d / 275.12h (was 10.98d / 263.5h at prior poll); 20 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 19); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. PRED-105 silent-ignore continues: predictions.html byte-identical (md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785, 152,936 bytes) for 18th consecutive poll / ~8.36 days byte-identical (since 2026-04-20T14:29:27Z); literal 'Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' + 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' badge unchanged; PRED-105 now 10.46d past 2026-04-18 close — SEVERITY HIGH per Step 10b day-8+ rule (analyst already holds silent_ignore verdict; no state change required). Step 10b imminent watch returned 8 entries, all 'April 2026' EOM closures parsing to 2026-04-30 (~2.04d from now): PRED-077 (M2 tidal Honolulu), PRED-081 (JWST z<0.1 SN Type Ia), PRED-085 (S-wave shadow zone), PRED-087 (Geoid low stationary), PRED-088 (Second geoid low 70°N/135°W), PRED-090 (TOA flux excess, our_verdict=recycled), PRED-105 (Cu coil cucumber — false positive in 10b due to imprecise 'April 2026 (14-day window)' string in our predictions.json; actual close was 2026-04-18), PRED-111 (Mascon >20 mGal). Notable data-file gap: PRED-106 (16 Hz Aetheric Field Increases Ca²+ Signaling >20%) is registered on dome predictions.html but is NOT yet in our data/predictions.json — analyst Mode 1b ingestion candidate. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots, status_history.json.ots), no new prediction-isolation file, 0 canary-keyword hits across last 30 commits. Content-security sweep clean (no prompt-injection phrases, no anomalous hidden CSS rules across home/predictions). Repo description still null. Watch for next poll: (1) 8TH daily-review regen due ~07:41Z 2026-04-29; HOLD (registry 69/4/10 byte-identical) extends streak to 8, ABSORB → CRITICAL goalpost-rewrite trigger per Step 5b. (2) 8 April-EOM closures (PRED-077/-081/-085/-087/-088/-090/-105-real/-111) all hit 2026-04-30; first post-closure poll likely evening of 2026-04-30 or morning of 2026-05-01 — watch for quiet pass-mark vs silent-ignore-in-progress vs goalpost-move on predictions.html. (3) PRED-105 enters d=11+ past 04-18 close at next poll; analyst may want to consider moving from silent_ignore to tacit_withdrawal if no result by 14d (2026-05-02). (4) PRED-106 ingestion gap — analyst Mode 1b should pick this up and write data/predictions.json entry. (5) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (6) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that is the canary fix. (7) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only (not status_history.json) → CANARY TRIGGERED, escalate immediately.
